en.eNote: No meals logged for Jul 6 – Jul 12 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged ~364 kcal/day, peaking 665 on Wednesday's pool intervals and 624 on Thursday's squat + swim. Monday (Jul 6) and Friday (Jul 10) were rest days (63 and 32 kcal); Sunday (Jul 12) is just starting — rest or an easy hike/bike planned.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −778 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Sunday (Jul 12) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Wednesday's pool set was the week's hardest swim
en.i1: Wednesday's 2.2 km pool session (10×100 / 10×50, avg HR 127, max 153, 65 min) drove 769 active kcal — the biggest single-session burn of the week and a clear step up in intensity from the easy technique swims.
en.i2: Aerobic work came from Wednesday's harder 2.2 km pool intervals (avg HR 127) and Thursday's short 0.8 km pool swim (avg HR 111) alongside the squat session — one quality swim plus easy volume. Last week's Zagreb hike has now rolled out of the 7-day window.
en.i3t: Recovery: autonomics steady, sleep quality eased
en.i3: This morning RHR held at 54 (right on the 7-day average) and HRV stayed at 37 (level vs the previous night, just under the 40 baseline). Last night was long but lighter — 7h43 at score 78 — with deep only 52m and 30m awake, following Saturday's trap-bar deadlift.
en.i4t: Strength: three lifts, hack squat leads tonnage
en.i4: Three strength sessions this window: Tuesday's hack squat 13,986 kg (the only Hevy-logged lift), Thursday's squat (Garmin 59 min, avg HR 108) and Saturday's trap-bar deadlift (Garmin 49 min, avg HR 119, max 149). The trap-bar hasn't synced to Hevy yet, so its tonnage and set-peaks will fill on the next refresh.
en.rec: Sunday is a recovery day — rest, or an easy hike or bike if you feel like moving. The week behind: 5 sessions across 4 active days (4h33, ~2,708 active kcal) — three strength sessions (hack squat 13,986 kg Tuesday, a squat Thursday, and Saturday's trap-bar deadlift) plus two pool swims (a 2.2 km interval set and a short technique swim). Monday and Friday were rest days. Recovery is steady: RHR 54 and HRV 37 (just under baseline) off a long 7h43 at score 78. Keep today easy and let the legs absorb Saturday's pulls. Next: rest/hike Sunday, then the swim + strength rotation resumes Monday.
en.foot: Data: 2026-07-06 → 2026-07-12 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 6.7. – 12.7. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. ~364 kcal/dan, vrhunac 665 na srijedinim bazenskim intervalima i 624 na četvrtkovom čučnju + plivanju. Ponedjeljak (6.7.) i petak (10.7.) bili su dani odmora (63 i 32 kcal); nedjelja (12.7.) tek počinje — planiran odmor ili lagano planinarenje/bicikl.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −778 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Nedjelja (12.7.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1t: Srijedin bazenski set bio je najteže plivanje tjedna
hr.i1: Srijedino plivanje 2,2 km u bazenu (10×100 / 10×50, prosj. puls 127, maks 153, 65 min) donijelo je 769 aktivnih kcal — najveća potrošnja pojedinačnog treninga u tjednu i jasan skok intenziteta u odnosu na lagana tehnička plivanja.
hr.i2: Aerobni rad došao je iz srijedinih težih bazenskih intervala 2,2 km (prosj. puls 127) i četvrtkovog kratkog plivanja 0,8 km (prosj. puls 111) uz trening čučnja — jedno kvalitetno plivanje plus lagana volumena. Prošlotjedno planinarenje u Zagrebu sad je izašlo iz 7-dnevnog prozora.
hr.i3t: Oporavak: autonomika stabilna, kvaliteta sna popustila
hr.i3: Jutros je RHR ostao na 54 (točno na 7-dnevnom prosjeku), a HRV na 37 (isto kao prethodna noć, tik ispod osnovice od 40). Sinoć dugo ali laganije — 7h43 uz ocjenu 78 — uz duboki san samo 52m i 30m budnosti, nakon subotnjeg trap-bar mrtvog dizanja.
hr.i4t: Snaga: tri dizanja, hack squat vodi u tonaži
hr.i4: Tri treninga snage ovog razdoblja: utorkov hack squat 13.986 kg (jedino dizanje u Hevyju), četvrtkov čučanj (Garmin 59 min, prosj. puls 108) i subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje (Garmin 49 min, prosj. puls 119, maks 149). Trap-bar još nije sinkroniziran s Hevyjem, pa će mu se tonaža i vrhovi serija popuniti pri sljedećem osvježavanju.
hr.rec: Nedjelja je dan oporavka — odmor ili lagano planinarenje/bicikl ako se da kretati. Tjedan iza: 5 treninga kroz 4 aktivna dana (4h33, ~2.708 aktivnih kcal) — tri treninga snage (hack squat 13.986 kg u utorak, čučanj u četvrtak i subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje) plus dva bazenska plivanja (intervalni set 2,2 km i kratko tehničko plivanje). Ponedjeljak i petak bili su dani odmora. Oporavak je stabilan: RHR 54 i HRV 37 (tik ispod osnovice) nakon dugih 7h43 uz ocjenu 78. Neka danas bude lagano i neka noge apsorbiraju subotnja dizanja. Sljedeće: odmor/planinarenje u nedjelju, zatim se rotacija plivanje + snaga vraća u ponedjeljak.
hr.foot: Podaci: 6.7. → 12.7.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
